features: Perfect Fit for Multiple Consoles: This stylish Switch 2025 travel case works seamlessly with the Nintendo Switch 2, original Switch, and Switch OLED. Its cleverly molded graphics add a stylish touch. Not bulky, not easy to slip off - a must-have for Switch 2 accessories.

Water-Resistant & Easy to Clean：Spills happen! The smooth PU exterior of this Switch 2 protective case shrugs off light splashes and wipes clean in seconds. Keep your console and accessories looking like new, whether you’re commuting or gaming on the go.

Soft Inside, Tough Outside:Your console stays scratch-free thanks to plush inner lining that feels like velvet. Wrapped in shock-absorbing EVA padding, this Switch 2 carry case guards against bumps and drops, while the rigid shell keeps its shape even when stuffed in a backpack.

Smart Storage for Switch 2 Accessories:10 dedicated slots for game cards, and a storage pocket for Joy Con 2 controllers, cables, power banks or other accessories - all separated from the main compartment. Say goodbye to the worry of scratched screens or lost accessories!

Grip-Friendly & Travel-Ready:The rubberized handle stays comfy in your hand, and dual zippers open smoothly in either direction. Bonus: Built-in elastic straps inside this Switch 2 carrying case lock your console in place, so it won’t shift around during adventures.
